content:

From the DVD/CD "Hall & Oates - A&E Live by Request"

Ooh[/tab]
[tab]Amin(add11)/D     [ch]G[/ch]
Oh-woh-oh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amin[/ch]       [ch]G6[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
Oh-woh-oh (ooooooooooooo. . .)[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Ooh[/tab]
[tab]Amin(add11)/D     [ch]G[/ch]
Oh-woh-oh (ohhhhhhhhhhhhhh, that's right . . .)[/tab]


[BRIDGE]  Key change here - play the following chord progression as Daryl freestyles and 
T-Bone shows off...

[ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Dm7[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]      
 [ch]Dm7[/ch]


[CHORUS 3] The band sings the third chorus a cappela, clapping out the beat - there's a
short break right before "FINAL CHORUS" (after the band sings their last "you're out of
touch" in "CHORUS 3"), where they strum out . . .

[ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch]     [ch]E[/ch] . . . about 12 times

and then . . .


[FINAL CHORUS]

[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You're out of touch[/tab]
[tab]Amin(add11)/D     [ch]G[/ch]
I'm out of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amin[/ch]       [ch]G6[/ch]        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]
But I'm out of my head when you're not around[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
You're out of touch[/tab]
[tab]Amin(add11)/D     [ch]G[/ch]
I'm out of time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Amin[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Amin[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm out of my head when you're not around . . .[/tab]

Repeat this progression over and over again as Daryl freestyles, and when the song
finally comes to and end, bang out an "Amin" as the closing chord.

NOTE: If some of this tablature seems unclear (i.e. the rhythm, the timing, the
transitions, the ending, etc.), just listen to the song - it should be pretty self-explanatory.
Also, feel free to replace "Amin(add11)/D" with a basic "Dm" if it sounds better.
This tab should also work fairly well with the studio recording.
